productDisplayName: Hanes Men Half Sleeve Crew Pack of 3 Red Innerwear T-shirts
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Composition Pack of 3 t-shirts in red, white and navy blue T-shirt made of ComfortSoft 100% combed cotton, has a lay flat collar, crew neck, fabric tape on the inseam of the back shoulder and neck, and half sleeves Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Lightweight with a round neck, these hanes half-sleeved t-shirts in ComfortSoft cotton are stylish, and yet relaxed. The lay flat collar never stretches out of shape even after repeated washes, while the fabric simply flows over your torso. Perfect on its own with jeans, these T-shirts also work great with shorts and track pants. Model statistics The model wears size M in T-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
